frame_analyses.description: Initial setup showing peg board with 6 colored objects (blue, red, purple, green, red, blue) positioned on left side pegs. No instruments visible yet.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Standard starting configuration for peg transfer task

frame_analyses.description: Two laparoscopic graspers entering field. Left grasper approaching red object on left side peg.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instruments entering simultaneously, appropriate approach angle

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper grasping red object from peg. Right grasper positioned nearby for transfer.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean grasp of object, no fumbling observed

frame_analyses.description: Red object being transferred from left to right grasper in midair. Purple object visible being manipulated.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth midair transfer technique, instruments coordinated well

frame_analyses.description: Right grasper placing red object on right side peg. Purple object also being transferred.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Accurate placement on peg, no difficulty with positioning

frame_analyses.description: Multiple objects visible in transfer process. Green and red objects being manipulated simultaneously.
Beginning reverse direction transfer. Right grasper picking up objects from right side pegs.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean transition to reverse direction phase

frame_analyses.description: Objects being transferred back from right to left side. Multiple objects in various stages of transfer.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining good pace in reverse direction

frame_analyses.description: Final objects being placed back on left side pegs. Task nearing completion.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Accurate final placements, task completing successfully

frame_analyses.description: All 6 objects returned to starting positions on left side pegs. Instruments withdrawing.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed successfully, all objects properly positioned

confidence_rationale: Clear view of all transfers and object placements. No objects observed dropping outside the field or remaining off pegs. Completion time clearly observable from instrument entry to final withdrawal.
technique_summary: Solid intermediate level performance with efficient bilateral coordination. Completed task in 97 seconds with no penalties, demonstrating good fundamental laparoscopic skills.
improvement_suggestions: Reduce overall completion time to approach expert benchmark of 40-60 seconds
Work on simultaneous object manipulation to increase efficiency
Practice faster instrument positioning and coordination
